{
 "cells": [
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "id": "fe74f735",
   "metadata": {},
   "source": [
    "# Wakefield: a spline cavity\n",
    "\n",
    "The ABCI wakefield solver runs the bunch through the cavity and reports the wake potentials and the beam-coupling impedance, for any geometry through `cav.wakefield`. This notebook walks the full single-cavity plotting suite.\n",
    "\n",
    "> Needs the bundled `ABCI.exe` (Windows) / `abci` on PATH; ABCI needs a beam pipe at **both** ends."
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 1,
   "id": "67d07a5e",
   "metadata": {
    "execution": {
     "iopub.execute_input": "2026-07-24T10:13:15.807942Z",
     "iopub.status.busy": "2026-07-24T10:13:15.807638Z",
     "iopub.status.idle": "2026-07-24T10:13:17.367487Z",
     "shell.execute_reply": "2026-07-24T10:13:17.366809Z"
    }
   },
   "outputs": [],
   "source": [
    "import os, tempfile\n",
    "import matplotlib.pyplot as plt\n",
    "from cavsim2d import SplineCavity\n",
    "from cavsim2d.utils.style import apply_style\n",
    "apply_style()\n",
    "\n",
    "WF = {'MROT': 2, 'wakelength': 20, 'bunch_length': 25}   # long.+trans., 20 m, 25 mm"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "id": "cfca6603",
   "metadata": {},
   "source": [
    "## The cavity\n",
    "\n",
    "A Bezier spline with a **smooth iris** (`p1`, `p4` at the beam-pipe radius, so the wall leaves the pipe tangentially) and pipes at both ends."
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 2,
   "id": "5ed526c0",
   "metadata": {
    "execution": {
     "iopub.execute_input": "2026-07-24T10:13:17.369784Z",
     "iopub.status.busy": "2026-07-24T10:13:17.369572Z",
     "iopub.status.idle": "2026-07-24T10:13:17.495712Z",
     "shell.execute_reply": "2026-07-24T10:13:17.495022Z"
    }
   },
   "outputs": [
    {
     "data": {
      "image/png": "",
      "text/plain": [
       "<Figure size 800x300 with 1 Axes>"
      ]
     },
     "metadata": {},
     "output_type": "display_data"
    },
    {
     "data": {
      "text/plain": [
       "<Axes: xlabel='$z$ [mm]', ylabel='$r$ [mm]'>"
      ]
     },
     "execution_count": 2,
     "metadata": {},
     "output_type": "execute_result"
    }
   ],
   "source": [
    "geom = {'p0': [0, 35], 'p1': [30, 35], 'p2': [42, 103],\n",
    "        'p3': [78, 103], 'p4': [90, 35], 'p5': [120, 35]}\n",
    "spline = SplineCavity({'geometry': dict(geom), 'beampipe': 'both', 'beampipe_length': 40}, kind='Bezier')\n",
    "spline.name = 'spline'\n",
    "spline.set_workspace(os.path.join(tempfile.mkdtemp(), 'spline_wf'))\n",
    "spline.plot('geometry')"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 3,
   "id": "2e432b4d",
   "metadata": {
    "execution": {
     "iopub.execute_input": "2026-07-24T10:13:17.497331Z",
     "iopub.status.busy": "2026-07-24T10:13:17.497190Z",
     "iopub.status.idle": "2026-07-24T10:14:12.386873Z",
     "shell.execute_reply": "2026-07-24T10:14:12.386347Z"
    }
   },
   "outputs": [
    {
     "data": {
      "text/plain": [
       "{'|k_loss| [V/pC]': 0.0762,\n",
       " 'k_FM [V/pC]': 0.070104,\n",
       " 'k_loss_HOM [V/pC]': 0.006096000000000004,\n",
       " '|k_kick| [V/pC/m]': 3.314}"
      ]
     },
     "execution_count": 3,
     "metadata": {},
     "output_type": "execute_result"
    }
   ],
   "source": [
    "spline.wakefield.run(WF)\n",
    "spline.wakefield.qois"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "id": "3633bc61",
   "metadata": {},
   "source": [
    "## Impedance: longitudinal and transverse\n",
    "\n",
    "`MROT=2` computed both polarisations. The longitudinal impedance drives the beam's energy spread; the transverse drives beam-breakup."
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 4,
   "id": "b8e493fe",
   "metadata": {
    "execution": {
     "iopub.execute_input": "2026-07-24T10:14:12.388431Z",
     "iopub.status.busy": "2026-07-24T10:14:12.388306Z",
     "iopub.status.idle": "2026-07-24T10:14:12.750640Z",
     "shell.execute_reply": "2026-07-24T10:14:12.749903Z"
    }
   },
   "outputs": [
    {
     "data": {
      "image/png": "",
      "text/plain": [
       "<Figure size 1200x400 with 2 Axes>"
      ]
     },
     "metadata": {},
     "output_type": "display_data"
    }
   ],
   "source": [
    "fig, (a1, a2) = plt.subplots(1, 2, figsize=(12, 4))\n",
    "spline.wakefield.plot_impedance('longitudinal', ax=a1, show=False)\n",
    "spline.wakefield.plot_impedance('transverse', ax=a2, show=False)\n",
    "a1.set_title('longitudinal'); a2.set_title('transverse'); plt.show()"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "id": "1834fbe3",
   "metadata": {},
   "source": [
    "## Wake potential"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 5,
   "id": "e1c77ff3",
   "metadata": {
    "execution": {
     "iopub.execute_input": "2026-07-24T10:14:12.752843Z",
     "iopub.status.busy": "2026-07-24T10:14:12.752708Z",
     "iopub.status.idle": "2026-07-24T10:14:12.832101Z",
     "shell.execute_reply": "2026-07-24T10:14:12.831143Z"
    }
   },
   "outputs": [
    {
     "data": {
      "image/png": "",
      "text/plain": [
       "<Figure size 800x400 with 1 Axes>"
      ]
     },
     "metadata": {},
     "output_type": "display_data"
    },
    {
     "data": {
      "text/plain": [
       "<Axes: title={'center': 'Longitudinal wake'}, xlabel='S [m]', ylabel='$W_\\\\parallel$ [V/pC]'>"
      ]
     },
     "execution_count": 5,
     "metadata": {},
     "output_type": "execute_result"
    }
   ],
   "source": [
    "spline.wakefield.plot_wake('longitudinal')"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "id": "19a28615",
   "metadata": {},
   "source": [
    "## Loss- and kick-factor spectra\n",
    "\n",
    "The cumulative loss factor $k_\\parallel(F)$ and kick factor $k_\\perp(F)$ — how much of the wake is accumulated up to each frequency."
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 6,
   "id": "92117529",
   "metadata": {
    "execution": {
     "iopub.execute_input": "2026-07-24T10:14:12.834247Z",
     "iopub.status.busy": "2026-07-24T10:14:12.834109Z",
     "iopub.status.idle": "2026-07-24T10:14:12.929698Z",
     "shell.execute_reply": "2026-07-24T10:14:12.929066Z"
    }
   },
   "outputs": [
    {
     "data": {
      "image/png": "",
      "text/plain": [
       "<Figure size 1200x400 with 2 Axes>"
      ]
     },
     "metadata": {},
     "output_type": "display_data"
    }
   ],
   "source": [
    "fig, (a1, a2) = plt.subplots(1, 2, figsize=(12, 4))\n",
    "spline.wakefield.plot_k_loss(ax=a1, show=False)\n",
    "spline.wakefield.plot_k_kick(ax=a2, show=False)\n",
    "plt.show()"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "id": "807e9705",
   "metadata": {},
   "source": [
    "## Where to go next\n",

   ]
